catalog_content:
Item Name: Snak Club Mega Trail Mix, Family Size, 14 Ounce
Bullet Point 1: Fruity and Nutty Mix: This snack mix includes dried cranberries, almonds, pumpkin seeds, fancy cashews, pecans, and pistachio kernels. The blend is gluten-free*, kosher**, and has no artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives.
Bullet Point 2: Perfect for Any Snacker: Not only is it filled with flavor, but the nuts and 4g of protein per serving will help keep you satisfied throughout the day. The variety of dried fruit, nuts, and seeds has a little something for everyone.
Bullet Point 3: Snacks for Every Occasion: Our mixed snacks are a delicious solution for your snacking needs. They’re perfect to have as travel snacks, hiking snacks, party treats, or for at-home munching. You can even pack them as a lunch snack.
Bullet Point 4: Resealable Pouch: The 14 oz resealable bag makes this the ideal tasty treat for solo-snacking or sharing. This convenient trail mix package helps ensure you always enjoy fresh flavor when hunger strikes.
Bullet Point 5: Other Snak Club Cravings: We don’t stop at fruit and nut trail mixes. From raw, roasted, and seasoned nut varieties to sweet gummies with bold flavor, we’ve got unique and everyday gourmet-style snacks for you whenever you need them.
Value: 14.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A mid-range snack offering a variety of nuts and dried fruits in a convenient resealable pouch. Positioned as a healthy, protein-rich option with gluten-free certification and no artificial additives. The family-size packaging suggests value for money and versatility for various occasions.
